description: Reflective prompts and guided participant exercises used throughout the TRUE AI Discovery experience.

target.title: TARGET
target.description: Clarifying values, direction, goals, and meaningful movement.

reflections.prompt: What currently feels most important for you to better understand about yourself or your life direction?
What kinds of experiences, environments, or ways of living feel most meaningful to you right now?
When do you feel most emotionally steady, grounded, or aligned?
What values or priorities feel especially important to protect moving forward?
What would a more sustainable version of your current life look like?
What kinds of pressure or expectations most interfere with your sense of alignment?
What are you hoping feels different one year from now?

reflect.title: REFLECT
reflect.description: Exploring recurring friction, emotional load, sustainability, and internal tension.

reflections.prompt: What currently feels most difficult to sustain emotionally, mentally, or practically?
Where do you feel pressure accumulating most consistently?
What responsibilities or expectations feel heavier than they once did?
What patterns tend to appear when you become overwhelmed or emotionally depleted?
What parts of your life currently feel aligned, and what parts feel increasingly strained?
What needs or feelings do you most often set aside to continue functioning?
If one source of pressure disappeared tomorrow, what would change most for you?

upgrade.title: UPGRADE
upgrade.description: Identifying sustainable movement, supportive adjustments, and grounded next steps.

reflections.prompt: What would creating slightly more space or steadiness in your life look like right now?
What is one small adjustment that might make your current pace feel more sustainable?
What responsibilities or expectations may need clearer boundaries?
What kinds of support, recovery, or pacing have you been needing more consistently?
What strengths or qualities could support more aligned movement moving forward?
What are you beginning to realize you may no longer want to carry?
What would gentler, more sustainable growth look like for you personally?

capacity.title: Capacity Reflection
capacity.description: Helping participants recognize emotional and energetic sustainability realities.

reflections.prompt: What situations most quickly drain your emotional or mental energy?
How do you usually recognize that you are approaching overload?
What helps you recover when pressure has been building for a long time?
What forms of rest or spaciousness feel genuinely restorative for you?
What has become harder to sustain recently that once felt manageable?

strengths.title: Strength Reflection
strengths.description: Helping participants identify grounded supportive internal resources.

reflections.prompt: What qualities have helped you continue moving through difficult seasons?
What strengths do other people consistently seem to recognize in you?
What kinds of situations bring out the best or most grounded version of you?
What personal qualities help you create stability or care for others?
Which strengths may sometimes become overextended or emotionally costly?

alignment.title: Alignment Reflection
alignment.description: Exploring congruence between values, direction, pacing, and lived experience.

reflections.prompt: Where in your life do you currently feel most aligned?
What parts of your life currently feel disconnected from your deeper values?
What expectations or patterns feel increasingly inconsistent with who you want to become?
What environments or relationships help you feel more emotionally steady and authentic?
What would a more emotionally honest version of your current life look like?
